title: mespilus esquirolii
intro: Mespilus esquirolii, also known as the Chinese rowan or Quong Zao, is a plant species native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of certain diseases. Mespilus esquirolii is often prepared in herbal teas, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
